diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -53,6 +53,26 @@
         x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb], dim=-1)

         x = self.dropout(x)

         h, _ = self.lstm(x)

+        h = self.dropout(h)

+        logits = self.out(h)

+        return logits

+

+class DKT_Concat_GRU(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=2, dropout=0.2):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.num_skills = num_skills

+        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)

+        self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)

+        self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=dropout)

+        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)

+        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

+        

+    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):

+        s_emb = self.skill_emb(skill_ids)

+        c_emb = self.correct_emb(corrects)

+        x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb], dim=-1)

+        x = self.dropout(x)

+        h, _ = self.gru(x)

         h = self.dropout(h)

         logits = self.out(h)

         return logits

@@ -123,13 +143,13 @@
         interaction_embeds = interaction_embeds + self.pos_emb(pos_interactions)

         query_embeds = query_embeds + self.pos_emb(pos_queries)

         

-        mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(T, T, device=skill_ids.device), diagonal=1).bool()

+        causal_mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(T, T, device=skill_ids.device), diagonal=1).bool()

         

-        attn_out, _ = self.attn(query_embeds, interaction_embeds, interaction_embeds, attn_mask=mask)

+        attn_out, _ = self.attn(query_embeds, interaction_embeds, interaction_embeds, attn_mask=causal_mask)

+        attn_out = self.layer_norm1(attn_out + query_embeds)

         

-        x = self.layer_norm1(query_embeds + self.dropout(attn_out))

-        ffn_out = self.ffn(x)

-        x = self.layer_norm2(x + ffn_out)

+        ffn_out = self.ffn(attn_out)

+        out = self.layer_norm2(ffn_out + attn_out)

         

-        logits = self.out(x).squeeze(-1) # [B, T]

+        logits = self.out(out).squeeze(-1)

         return logits
